Smart Waste
Management Platform

A modern system to manage urban waste operations efficiently.

View Dashboard

The Problem

Urban waste management often suffers from poor coordination, lack of visibility, and inefficient resource utilization.

The Solution

A centralized platform that manages bins, vehicles, drivers, and authorities through structured data and workflows.

{/* FEATURES */}
🗑️

Smart Bin Tracking

Monitor bin data and collection status.

🚛

Fleet Management

Manage waste collection vehicles efficiently.

👷

Driver Assignment

Assign drivers and manage responsibilities.

📊

Data-Driven

Powered by a structured relational database.

{/* CTA */}

Built for Smarter Cities

Explore the System
); } export default Landing;
